title: pfr operation
description: Operation block of an isothermal plug-flow reactor.  The volume is integrated by hand-rolled RK4; nSteps controls the spatial discretisation.

V_R.title: Reactor volume
V_R.description: Total reactor volume.  RK4 integrates along the residence time interval [0, V_R / Q_feed].

nSteps.title: RK4 steps
nSteps.description: Number of integration steps along the reactor length.  100 is plenty for first-order kinetics; raise it if the rate is stiff.

writeInterval.title: Profile log interval
writeInterval.description: How often to print the (V, T, conversion) profile along the reactor.  0 = silent end-point only.
